name: 撒糖型（霸總式寵溺）
description: 男主用霸道但深情的方式表達愛意，佔有慾與柔情並存。讓觀眾感受到強烈的甜蜜和心動。
tags: 製造甜蜜感，滿足戀愛幻想

examples.drama_title: On her first day, the cleaning girl defied the CEO, expecting to be fired—but he proposed to her!
examples.excerpt: You're the only one I want. / If my wife tells me to go east, I'll never go west. / I know, babe. It's just because I care about you too much. / Honey, you're the one in charge of Chongchin Group. Of course, you're also the one steering my life.
examples.context: 製造甜蜜感，滿足戀愛幻想
